title: psilotrichum scleranthum
intro: Psilotrichum scleranthum, also known as "palo amarillo," is a plant species belonging to the family Psilotaceae, native to South America. The medicinal properties of Psilotrichum scleranthum include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of this plant are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and soothe digestive problems. Herbal preparations of Psilotrichum scleranthum can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, often used to treat colds, flu, and other respiratory infections.
